criteria.criterion: setup.js auto-executes Ollama install (not just prints)
After install, auto-pulls recommended model with progress
Install failure outputs clear error and exits non-zero
Local SenseVoice unavailable: auto-fallback to OpenAI Whisper
Local Kokoro unavailable: auto-fallback to OpenAI TTS
README has install (npx/global/Docker), config, API endpoints, Docker example
